## Description / Excerpt

A reusable instruction for asking another assistant or automated agent to convert a document into the ShimmeryMemory.com Markdown publishing format.

Excerpt:

## Purpose This is a copyable instruction for preparing documents for publication on ShimmeryMemory.com. Use it when working with another assistant, automated agent, device, or platform that needs to generate a compatible Markdown artifact. ## Copyable Instruction ```text I’m pre
